title: [FIRRTL] infer width (cat)
body:
The following FIRRTL program:

```python
circuit top_mod :
  module top_mod :
    output tmp53: UInt<25>
    tmp53 <= cat(UInt("h1ebaa2"), UInt<3>("h2"))
```

Compiled with `firtool a_top_mod.fir --lower-to-hw --lower-types --expand-whens --infer-widths --lowering-options=noAlwaysFF --verilog -o=a_top_mod_new.v` fails with the following error:

```
a_top_mod.fir:4:11: error: destination width 25 is not greater than or equal to source width 27
    tmp53 <= cat(UInt("h1ebaa2"), UInt<3>("h2"))
          ^
a_top_mod.fir:4:11: note: see current operation: "firrtl.connect"(%tmp53, %0) : (!firrtl.uint<25>, !firrtl.uint<27>) -> ()
```

Compiled with `firrtl-1.5-SNAPSHOT` produces this Verilog:

```verilog
module top_mod(
  output [24:0] tmp53
);
  assign tmp53 = 25'hf5d512;
endmodule
```
